title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: MILTON-FREEWATER ADVOCACY CENTER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer domestic violence and sexual abuse support groups, including bilingual support groups. 722 S Main Street Milton Freewater, OR 97862 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 1pm-5pm by appointment only (541) 276-3322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-3322 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Umatilla Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLASSES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - TRAINING WORKSHOPS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADVOCACY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MILTON-FREEWATER ADVOCACY CENTER
